---
title: ""
about: 
  template: jolla
  image: Images/Taylor_headshot.jpeg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 25em
---

I'm an ecological consultant at Umwelt in Adelaide, South Australia. I hold a PhD in raptor ecology from Flinders University where I used a combination of field-collected data and citizen science data to quantify raptor urban tolerance at the global, regional and local level. I enjoy using statistical programming to investigate how wildlife use habitat at multiple scales to aid in their conservation.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
